description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a sleek, angular design and a combination of dark gray and red colors. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a textured, dark gray material, while two loose, red accent cushions add a pop of color and comfort. The armrests are straight, minimalistic, and feature a striking red frame that contrasts with the rest of the sofa. The legs are short, cylindrical, and metallic, providing sturdy support and a contemporary look. The backrest is continuous and slightly reclined, offering ergonomic support. The overall appearance is stylish and suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, dark gray sofa with red accent cushions, red-framed armrests, and metallic legs, featuring a sleek and contemporary design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's depth, the straight red armrest, and the arrangement of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three seat cushions, two red accent pillows, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the other armrest and cushion arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth backrest and the sofa's overall width.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and a continuous back cushion, with two loose red accent pillows placed at the corners; all cushions are uniform in size and appear attached except for the accent pillows.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, minimalistic armrests with a bold red frame, positioned at seat height and lacking additional padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical metallic legs located at the corners, with a simple, exposed design and a matte silver finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest with a slight recline and no visible segmentation or tufting; upholstered in the same textured fabric as the seat.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Textured, solid dark gray fabric with a subtle, irregular pattern; accent pillows have a visible geometric or quilted texture in red.
